content:
---
title: "Description"
---

# feat(auth): add JWT-based user authentication

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  subgraph client["Client"]
    login_page["Login Page"]:::unchanged
    api_client["API Client (updated)"]:::updated
  end

  subgraph auth["Auth Middleware (new)"]
    jwt_verify["JWT Verification"]:::added
    session_check["Session Validation"]:::added
  end

  subgraph backend["Backend Services"]
    auth_service["AuthService (new)"]:::added
    user_repo["UserRepository (new)"]:::added
    user_service["UserService (updated)"]:::updated
  end

  login_page -- "POST /auth/login" --> jwt_verify
  api_client -- "Bearer token" --> jwt_verify
  jwt_verify --> session_check --> auth_service
  auth_service --> user_service
  auth_service --> user_repo

  classDef unchanged stroke:#626D84,stroke-width:2px,fill:transparent,color:#1B2236,rx:8,ry:8
  classDef added stroke:#29A34A,stroke-width:2px,fill:transparent,color:#1B2236,rx:8,ry:8
  classDef updated stroke:#6B5FCE,stroke-width:2px,fill:transparent,color:#1B2236,rx:8,ry:8
  classDef subgraphStyle fill:transparent,stroke:#C0C5CF,stroke-width:1px,stroke-dasharray:5 5,rx:8,ry:8
  class client,auth,backend subgraphStyle
```
